result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= timestamp without time zone
LINE 8:     AND createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 mont...
                            ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH case_base AS (
  SELECT id AS case_id,
         createddate,
         closeddate,
         ownerid
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_events,
         MIN(ch.createddate) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS first_owner_event_dt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
),
not_transferred_cases AS (
  -- cases with <=1 owner assignment event in history (or none)
  SELECT cb.*
  FROM case_base cb
  LEFT JOIN assignments a ON a.case_id = cb.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(a.owner_change_events, 0) <= 1
),
agent_case_counts AS (
  -- filter applies to both initial owner and any transfer recipients
  SELECT agent_id,
         COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS managed_cases
  FROM (
    SELECT c.ownerid AS agent_id, c.id AS case_id
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')

    UNION

    SELECT ch.newvalue__c AS agent_id, ch.caseid__c AS case_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
      AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
  ) x
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) > 1
),
handle_time_by_agent AS (
  SELECT nt.ownerid AS agent_id,
         AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (nt.closeddate - nt.createddate))) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM not_transferred_cases nt
  GROUP BY nt.ownerid
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS id
FROM handle_time_by_agent h
JOIN agent_case_counts acc ON acc.agent_id = h.agent_id
ORDER BY h.avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH case_base AS (
  SELECT id AS case_id,
         createddate,
         closeddate,
         ownerid
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_events,
         MIN(ch.createddate) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS first_owner_event_dt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
),
not_transferred_cases AS (
  -- cases with <=1 owner assignment event in history (or none)
  SELECT cb.*
  FROM case_base cb
  LEFT JOIN assignments a ON a.case_id = cb.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(a.owner_change_events, 0) <= 1
),
agent_case_counts AS (
  -- filter applies to both initial owner and any transfer recipients
  SELECT agent_id,
         COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS managed_cases
  FROM (
    SELECT c.ownerid AS agent_id, c.id AS case_id
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')

    UNION

    SELECT ch.newvalue__c AS agent_id, ch.caseid__c AS case_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
      AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
  ) x
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) > 1
),
handle_time_by_agent AS (
  SELECT nt.ownerid AS agent_id,
         AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (nt.closeddate - nt.createddate))) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM not_transferred_cases nt
  GROUP BY nt.ownerid
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS id
FROM handle_time_by_agent h
JOIN agent_case_counts acc ON acc.agent_id = h.agent_id
ORDER BY h.avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH case_base AS (
  SELECT id AS case_id,
         createddate,
         closeddate,
         ownerid
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_events,
         MIN(ch.createddate) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS first_owner_event_dt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
),
not_transferred_cases AS (
  -- cases with <=1 owner assignment event in history (or none)
  SELECT cb.*
  FROM case_base cb
  LEFT JOIN assignments a ON a.case_id = cb.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(a.owner_change_events, 0) <= 1
),
agent_case_counts AS (
  -- filter applies to both initial owner and any transfer recipients
  SELECT agent_id,
         COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS managed_cases
  FROM (
    SELECT c.ownerid AS agent_id, c.id AS case_id
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')

    UNION

    SELECT ch.newvalue__c AS agent_id, ch.caseid__c AS case_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
      AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
  ) x
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) > 1
),
handle_time_by_agent AS (
  SELECT nt.ownerid AS agent_id,
         AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (nt.closeddate - nt.createddate))) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM not_transferred_cases nt
  GROUP BY nt.ownerid
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS id
FROM handle_time_by_agent h
JOIN agent_case_counts acc ON acc.agent_id = h.agent_id
ORDER BY h.avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH case_base AS (
  SELECT id AS case_id,
         createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
         closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts,
         ownerid AS owner_id
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_events
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
),
not_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT cb.*
  FROM case_base cb
  LEFT JOIN assignments a ON a.case_id = cb.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(a.owner_change_events, 0) <= 1
),
agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id,
         COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS managed_cases
  FROM (
    SELECT c.ownerid AS agent_id, c.id AS case_id
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')

    UNION

    SELECT ch.newvalue__c AS agent_id, ch.caseid__c AS case_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
      AND c.createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
  ) x
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) > 1
),
handle_time_by_agent AS (
  SELECT nt.owner_id AS agent_id,
         AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (nt.closed_ts - nt.created_ts))) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM not_transferred_cases nt
  GROUP BY nt.owner_id
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS id
FROM handle_time_by_agent h
JOIN agent_case_counts acc ON acc.agent_id = h.agent_id
ORDER BY h.avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;
